checks.text: Colors come from the MUI palette (primary/secondary/error/etc.), no off-palette hex.
Spacing is a multiple of the 8px spacing unit.
Surfaces use the 4px theme.shape.borderRadius (or a consistent multiple).
Paper/Card surfaces use MUI elevation shadows, not arbitrary shadows.
Type uses the Roboto-based MUI typography scale.
Interactive targets are at least 48px (MUI default min).
Text meets WCAG AA contrast against its surface.
